text:
- In the gift icon section, display the user's eligibility status, claimable token amount (e.g., based on a Merkle proof or wallet snapshot), and a "Claim Airdrop" button.
- Use Moralis API for wallet authentication and onchain queries (check eligibility without leaving the app).
- When the user clicks Claim, execute the transaction in-app: Connect wallet if needed, sign the claim tx, and transfer tokens to the user's address on Base chain.
- Handle errors like "Already claimed" or "Not eligible", and show a success message with updated balance after claim.
- Make it gas-efficient; no redirects or external sites—keep everything seamless within the app.
- Token details: [Specify your token, e.g., ERC20 at address 0x..., total airdrop supply 1M tokens, eligibility for users with >0.01 ETH balance or custom criteria].
- Update the UI to be clean, matching the existing theme with badges and buttons.

Diagnostic complete and publish-ready.
